purpose: Add traceable candidate infrastructure records for later validation. These records are not mixed into active GeoJSON because specific official project pages, geometry, contractor confirmation, or full field validation still need review.

summary.excluded_from_active_reason: Candidate records need project-specific official source pages, complete geometry, and full field validation before active publication.
